channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Multiple accidents at junction. Road markings not visible., 15th May
item.description:
The junction of Highgrove Way & Trafalgar Drive Churchdown
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Highgrove Way, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Road marking white lines or studs

item.description:
Please see photo

item.category: Complete bollard is damaged (Non illuminating bollard or post)

item.title: Wooden bridge is rotting and very unstable to walk on, 15th May

item.title: Traffic can be witnessed driving around this one which is just prior to the pedestrian controlled light heading into Cheltenham at this junction, 15th May
item.description:
What three words /// Angel. Grapes.Kite
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1a, London Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham

item.title: Silver Birch Tree has died, 15th May
item.description:
On the shrubbery island in Winton Close, close to a parking laybye behind No. 11 & No.9 Loweswater Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Winton Close, Warden Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 25cm wide and 1m long across the rd front of 68Alstone lane, Cheltenham, 15th May
item.description:
It is immediately after turning left from Rowanfield road oppsite to level crossing. It is an old road work across the road from one side to the other on Alstone lane front of 68 Alstone lane. The damage is causing structural vibration in the house when a larger vehicle, bus etc.passing through. This issue is present for at least 6 Months now and getting worst as the damage on the road is detarrieting.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 71, Alstone Lane, Alstone, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cars parking on bend, 15th May
item.description:
Cars are continually parking on the bends in this road making it very difficult for drivers to see approaching traffic. Also makes it difficult for pedestrians to cross.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Boverton Drive, Brockworth, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 15th May
item.description:
Cut hedge back. Completed by inspector at time of visit. 3mtrs Give and take TM Junction with Village Road (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped 2 large canisters of nitrous oxide at the top of Cudnall St Charlton Kings - see position on attached photos, 15th May
item.description:
These canisters have been left on the pavement for over 2 weeks. I assume they are a hazard and need removing for specialist recycling.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 291, Cirencester Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 15th May
item.description:
Cut hedge back to boundary 00mtrs Give and take with Footway Closure TM Outside number 29 (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet
